title: TRIGGER
sub: Event plugins → action. When something happens (a webhook, a new file, …), an agent/group acts. Plug-and-play: each event source is a plugin. For time-based runs, use Schedule.
empty: No triggers yet. Create one — e.g. an incoming webhook → ask an agent to handle it. (Need a time schedule instead? Use the Schedule tab.)
prompt_ph: e.g. A new file {{name}} arrived at {{path}} — analyze and report.
